note: Entity Browser exposes its configuration through the entity_browser.browser.* config entity plus six plugin managers, so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded) and require no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using Entity Browser, what is the machine name / config prefix of the config entity that stores a single browser's configuration, and where is its admin UI? Name the config entity and the admin route or path.
evals.expected_output: Each browser is the config entity entity_browser.browser.{name}, managed at /admin/config/content/entity_browser (route entity.entity_browser.collection).

evals.prompt: I'm assembling an entity browser. Which four pluggable parts make up a browser config entity, i.e. the four plugin types selected per browser? Name them.
evals.expected_output: display, widget_selector, widgets, and selection_display (Display, Widget, WidgetSelector, SelectionDisplay plugin types).

evals.prompt: I want to add a custom Widget plugin to Entity Browser in my module. What PHP namespace / directory does the plugin class go in, which annotation does it use, and which base class does it extend?
evals.expected_output: Class in src/Plugin/EntityBrowser/Widget/, annotated @EntityBrowserWidget, extending Drupal\entity_browser\WidgetBase.

evals.prompt: In Entity Browser, the Display plugin decides how a browser opens. What are the three core display plugins that ship with the module?
evals.expected_output: iframe, modal, and standalone (standalone has its own page/route).

evals.prompt: I have an entity_reference field and want editors to pick items through an Entity Browser instead of the autocomplete. On Manage form display, which field widget do I choose, and what is its machine name?
evals.expected_output: The 'Entity browser' widget, machine name entity_reference_browser (for file/image fields it is entity_browser_file).

evals.prompt: In custom PHP on a Drupal 11 site, I want to embed a configured entity browser inline in my own form and get the selected entities back. Which form/render element type do I use, and how do I convert its submitted value into entity objects?
evals.expected_output: Use '#type' => 'entity_browser' (EntityBrowserElement) with #entity_browser set to the browser id; convert the type:id value with EntityBrowserElement::processEntityIds().

evals.prompt: I want ready-made example entity browsers to look at and copy, without building configuration from scratch. Which Entity Browser submodule provides them, and what is its machine name?
evals.expected_output: The Entity Browser example submodule, machine name entity_browser_example, which ships example browsers.

evals.prompt: In Entity Browser, a browser with a standalone display exposes its own page/route. What permission gates access to that browser's pages, and what is the pattern of the auto-generated per-browser permission?
evals.expected_output: A dynamic permission per route-exposing browser: 'access {browser_id} entity browser pages' (e.g. access sample entity browser pages); the admin permission is 'administer entity browsers'.
